title: Add conditions to the slack integration (only if)
excerpt: Being able to add conditions to the slack integration. I would like to send slack notifications only for some items in one of our boards but right now I can only do it for all. I want be able to customize what things are…

posts.author: RayaSlavova (Raya Slavova)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to add conditions to the slack integration. I would like to send slack notifications only for some items in one of our boards but right now I can only do it for all. I want be able to customize what things are notified and not just everything.

posts.author: kphays (Katelyn Hays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed - I have automations in place to help keep the items assigned to me organized. We recently implemented a request form for our team, and I would like to be able to set up slack notifications only to myself (I don’t want to inundate the rest of the team with slack messages if they don’t want it).

Currently, the only slack notification integration that works with conditions (and/or workflows) is the “notify in channel.” It would be nice to be able to use the “notify user” notification integration in both automations with conditions as well as workflows.
